summary: Test suite covers core requirements (artifact factory, max age/keep-latest/total-size policies, dry-run, summary computation) with reasonable organization. Gaps: Format-CleanupPlan untested, CLI entry point (Invoke-Cleanup.ps1) not tested in Pester tests, limited fixture-driven testing (one integration test at end that skips if file missing). Edge case coverage is weak—missing tests for size=0 artifacts, KeepLatestPerWorkflow=0, extreme MaxTotalSizeBytes, identical timestamps, and JSON parsing errors. Design is clear with good Describe blocks and readable assertions, but lacks helper functions, BeforeEach/AfterEach isolation, and comments explaining test scenarios. Would catch obvious regressions in core logic but miss boundary conditions and error paths.
